hyperedges.label: Order Pipeline (Coupang intake → internal order → shipment → unshipped/settlement)
Ad Automation Pipeline (Snapshot → Action → ExecutionTask → ExecutionLog, Worker)
Thumbnail AI Pipeline (Analysis → Generation → Tracking → Thumbnail CTR)
Agent Runtime Loop (Definition → WakeupRequest → HeartbeatRun → AgentEvent)
Workflow Execution (Template → Run, delegates to AgentTask)
Purchase Receiving (Supplier → PurchaseOrder → PurchaseOrderItem → SupplierPayment → Inventory/StockTransaction)
Warehouse Movement (Warehouse → StockTransfer from/to → StockTransaction → Inventory)
Picking Fulfillment (PickingList → PickingItem → Shipment)
Master normalization layer (Master* tables shadow operational)
Marketplace distribution (type=agent|workflow, publishes AgentDefinition + WorkflowTemplate)
Nine-domain partition of 67 models
